title: ptisana kingii
intro: Ptisana kingii, also known as King fern or Renga fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Marattiaceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. In terms of health benefits, Ptisana kingii is believed to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption.
